---
title: "SWMP_Tidal_Range & MLW depth at each station"
author: "Katie Petrinec"
date: "2/17/2022", Updated: "05/30/2025"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE) 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r install packages}
library(here)
library(SWMPr)
library(dplyr)
```

## Load data

```{r load data, echo=FALSE}
dfPI <- import_local(here("data"), 'gtmpiwq', trace=T)

dfSS <- import_local(here("data"), 'gtmsswq', trace=T)

dfFM <- import_local(here("data"), 'gtmfmwq', trace=T)

dfPC <- import_local(here("data"), 'gtmpcwq', trace=T)

dfPCDepth <- import_local(here("data", "PCcorrectedForDepth"), 'gtmpcwq', trace=T)

#Check column data types
sapply(dfPI, class)
sapply(dfSS, class)
sapply(dfFM, class)
sapply(dfPC, class)
```

##Create a new dataframe to work with

```{r new dataframe, echo=FALSE}
dPI<-dfPI
dSS<-dfSS
dFM<-dfFM
dPC<-dfPC
dPCDepth<-dfPCDepth
```

##Assign d$datetimestamp to variable d$Date

```{r create date column, echo=FALSE}
dPI$Date <- format(dPI$datetimestamp, "%y-%m-%d",tz="EST")

dSS$Date <- format(dSS$datetimestamp, "%y-%m-%d",tz="EST")

dFM$Date <- format(dFM$datetimestamp, "%y-%m-%d",tz="EST")

dPC$Date <- format(dPC$datetimestamp, "%y-%m-%d",tz="EST")

dPCDepth$Date <- format(dPCDepth$datetimestamp, "%y-%m-%d",tz="EST")
```

# get MLW values

```{r MLW - 2 lowest cdepth readings each day, echo=FALSE}
PIMLW <- dPI %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%   # Group by date
  slice_min(cdepth, n = 2)  # Select the two lowest values within each group

SSMLW <- dSS %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%   # Group by date
  slice_min(cdepth, n = 2)  # Select the two lowest values within each group

FMMLW <- dFM %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%   # Group by date
  slice_min(cdepth, n = 2)  # Select the two lowest values within each group

PCMLW <- dPC %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%   # Group by date
  slice_min(cdepth, n = 2)  # Select the two lowest values within each group

PCDepthMLW <- dPCDepth %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%   # Group by date
  slice_min(depth, n = 2)  # Select the two lowest values within each group
```



##Aggregate data and run the max function assign to variable

```{r aggregate data - max function, echo=FALSE}
PImax <- aggregate(cbind("cdepth.max"=cdepth)~dPI$Date, data=dPI, FUN=max)

SSmax <- aggregate(cbind("cdepth.max"=cdepth)~dSS$Date, data=dSS, FUN=max)

FMmax <- aggregate(cbind("cdepth.max"=cdepth)~dFM$Date, data=dFM, FUN=max)

PCmax <- aggregate(cbind("clevel.max"=clevel)~dPC$Date, data=dPC, FUN=max)
```

##Aggregate data and run the min function assign to variable

```{r aggregate data - min function, echo=FALSE}
PImin <- aggregate(cbind("cdepth.min"=cdepth)~dPI$Date, data=dPI, FUN=min)

SSmin <- aggregate(cbind("cdepth.min"=cdepth)~dSS$Date, data=dSS, FUN=min)

FMmin <- aggregate(cbind("cdepth.min"=cdepth)~dFM$Date, data=dFM, FUN=min)

PCmin <- aggregate(cbind("clevel.min"=clevel)~dPC$Date, data=dPC, FUN=min)
```

##check max and min data to make sure the column length is the same

```{r check data, echo=FALSE}
summary(PImax)
summary(PImin)

summary(SSmax)
summary(SSmin)

summary(FMmax)
summary(FMmin)

summary(PCmax)
summary(PCmin)
```

##Bind data together into one dataframe

```{r bind data, echo=FALSE}
allPIData<-cbind(PImax, cdepth.min = PImin$cdepth.min)

allSSData<-cbind(SSmax, cdepth.min = SSmin$cdepth.min)

allFMData<-cbind(FMmax, cdepth.min = FMmin$cdepth.min)

allPCData<-cbind(PCmax, clevel.min = PCmin$clevel.min)
```

##Subtract max and min columns

```{r difference, echo=FALSE}
allPIData$difference <- (allPIData$cdepth.max - allPIData$cdepth.min)

allSSData$difference <- (allSSData$cdepth.max - allSSData$cdepth.min)

allFMData$difference <- (allFMData$cdepth.max - allFMData$cdepth.min)

allPCData$difference <- (allPCData$clevel.max - allPCData$clevel.min)
```

##Average difference column

```{r average difference, echo=FALSE}
PITidalRange<-mean(allPIData$difference, na.rm = TRUE)

SSTidalRange<-mean(allSSData$difference, na.rm = TRUE)

FMTidalRange<-mean(allFMData$difference, na.rm = TRUE)

PCTidalRange<-mean(allPCData$difference, na.rm = TRUE)
```

##Output average difference/tidal range

```{r average difference, echo=FALSE}
PITidalRange

SSTidalRange

FMTidalRange

PCTidalRange
```

#calculate average depth for metadata

```{r average cdepth, echo=FALSE}
summary(dPI$cdepth)
summary(dSS$cdepth)
summary(dFM$cdepth)
summary(dPC$cdepth)
```

#calculate average MLW depth for metadata
```{r average MLW cdepth, echo=FALSE}
summary(PIMLW$cdepth)
summary(SSMLW$cdepth)
summary(FMMLW$cdepth)
summary(PCDepthMLW$depth)
```
